title: Evangelism Report in Kenya - July 2024
summary: In this Evangelism Report we would like to highlight our mission to spread the gospel, inspired by Matthew 28:19 and Mark 16:15-18, which emphasizes teaching, baptizing, and performing miracles as signs of faith. We express our gratitude to Jesus, our supportive members, and the leadership of the Jesus Alone is God Headquarter Church. Jesus has enabled us to baptize ten individuals, with six more preparing, totaling thirty-one new believers. Motivated by the endurance of ministry described in 2 Corinthians 4:1-5, we remain dedicated to preaching the gospel truthfully. Despite challenges like insufficient funds and equipment, we traveled to Kisii County and Kajiado County, where we witnessed healing and deliverance. Our efforts, including an open-air crusade, resulted in twenty-five church members hearing the gospel and one person accepting Jesus. We conclude with a call to remain faithful in our mission, addressing any obstacles to effectiveness, and living a life that draws others to God.
